name: The Magic Academy of Meroida
description:
**You had been accepted to the ✨ The Magic academy of Meroida✨ as a brand new student!!** Pack your things right away, you're leaving this shithole to experience adventure of your life! 
---
Hey, I'm doing it at night, all sick and with massive headache, but still that didn't stopped me from doing this bot! It's also my first RPG bot, so whoever will find something to fix, go straight to reviews and let me know ;).
---
And thanks to my 3 followers. Hey, whoever you are, I appreciate that you're are here even tho I'm doing bot once a 2 months, love ya pookies 🫶.
